name: dataprovider-staking-workspace
description: Monorepo for the dataprovider_staking Solana program, SDK, admin scripts, and investor web app.

scripts.build:web: npm run build --workspace sdk && npm run build --workspace web
scripts.build: npm run build:sdk && npm run build:scripts
scripts.vercel-build: npm run build --workspace sdk && npm run build --workspace web
